channel.title: NPR Topics: Business
channel.description: Find the latest business news with reports on Wall Street, interest rates, banking, companies, and U.S. and world financial markets. Subscribe to the Business Story of the Day podcast.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Melania Trump wants ABC to 'take a stand' against Jimmy Kimmel after 'hateful' joke
item.description: Two days before the White House Correspondents' Dinner ended in gunfire, Kimmel delivered a mock Correspondents' Dinner speech during a sketch on his show. The first lady said it was "corrosive."
item.content:encoded:
Two days before the White House Correspondents' Dinner ended in gunfire, Kimmel delivered a mock Correspondents' Dinner speech during a sketch on his show. The first lady said it was "corrosive."

(Image credit: Mandel Ngan)
item.dc:creator: Mandalit del Barco

item.title: China blocks Meta from acquiring AI startup Manus
item.description: Meta said Monday that the transaction "complied fully with applicable law" and that it anticipates "an appropriate resolution to the inquiry."
item.content:encoded:
Meta said Monday that the transaction "complied fully with applicable law" and that it anticipates "an appropriate resolution to the inquiry."

(Image credit: Jeff Chiu/AP)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Climate disaster victims are rebuilding using prefab homes from boxy to bespoke
item.description: Wildfires, hurricanes, tornadoes and floods fueled by manmade climate change are changing the housing industry. That's because people are embracing prefab homes that can withstand extreme weather.
item.content:encoded:
Wildfires, hurricanes, tornadoes and floods fueled by manmade climate change are changing the housing industry. That's because people are embracing prefab homes that can withstand extreme weather.

(Image credit: Vanessa Romo)
item.dc:creator: Vanessa Romo

item.title: Musk vs. Altman: Tech CEOs head to court over the fate of OpenAI
item.description: The former OpenAI business partners are embroiled in a high-stakes dispute over the future of one of the world's top AI companies.
item.content:encoded:
The former OpenAI business partners are embroiled in a high-stakes dispute over the future of one of the world's top AI companies.

(Image credit: Michael Kovac/Getty Images for Vanity Fair)
item.dc:creator: John Ruwitch

item.title: Ingenious? Orwellian? Or both? Supreme Court considers constitutionality of 'geofence' warrants
item.description: The technique allows police to tap into giant tech-firm databases to find out who was near the scene of a crime and may have been involved.
item.content:encoded: The technique allows police to tap into giant tech-firm databases to find out who was near the scene of a crime and may have been involved.
item.dc:creator: Nina Totenberg

item.title: How the Iran war is impacting the airline industry
item.description: NPR's Ayesha Rascoe speaks with Bill McGee, Senior Fellow for Aviation and Travel at the American Economic Liberties Project, about how the Iran war is impacting the airline industry.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Ayesha Rascoe speaks with Bill McGee, Senior Fellow for Aviation and Travel at the American Economic Liberties Project, about how the Iran war is impacting the airline industry.
item.dc:creator: Ayesha Rascoe

item.title: Diary of a business owner trying to get a tariff refund from the U.S. government
item.description: What does it take to get a tariff refund? One small business owner kept an audio diary of his quest to get his money back from the U.S. government.
item.content:encoded: What does it take to get a tariff refund? One small business owner kept an audio diary of his quest to get his money back from the U.S. government.
item.dc:creator: Alina Selyukh

item.title: U.S. looks into regulating prediction market sites like Kalshi and Polymarket
item.description: Prediction markets have caught the attention of U.S. regulators as people have profited from privileged information.
item.content:encoded: Prediction markets have caught the attention of U.S. regulators as people have profited from privileged information.
item.dc:creator: Ayesha Rascoe

item.title: Airlines face headwinds as Iran war leads to rising fuel costs
item.description: Since the U.S. and Israel's war against Iran began, the impact on aviation has worsened. Jet fuel prices have soared. Thousands of European flights have been canceled, and one airline may stop flying.
item.content:encoded: Since the U.S. and Israel's war against Iran began, the impact on aviation has worsened. Jet fuel prices have soared. Thousands of European flights have been canceled, and one airline may stop flying.
item.dc:creator: Joel Rose

item.title: Justice Department drops probe into Fed Chair Jerome Powell
item.description: The move paves the way for the Senate to confirm Kevin Warsh, the president's nominee to head the central bank.
item.content:encoded:
The move paves the way for the Senate to confirm Kevin Warsh, the president's nominee to head the central bank.

(Image credit: Chip Somodevilla)
item.dc:creator: NPR Washington Desk
